name: MACE-MP-X Blueprint
objective: Universal atomistic potential pretraining on MPtrj followed by low-data chemistry adaptation.

recommended_extensions: elemental reference energy refit during cross-functional fine-tuning
optional charge-aware auxiliary targets when labels exist
curriculum spanning solids, surfaces, liquids, and reactive structures

training_hypothesis.fine_tuning_rule: re-fit atomic reference energies before updating GNN weights
training_hypothesis.expected_benefit: greater than 10x data efficiency versus scratch training, based on related-work evidence
